name: Elias Quinn
role: Father, scientist, scavenger — a secret creator of The Accord.

fields.Flaw: (draft) Secrecy. He lies 'to protect her,' and the lies curdle into their own betrayal.
fields.Need: (draft) To accept that atonement can't be bought with his daughter's life — that love means protecting Molly, not sacrificing her. [open: redemption or tragedy?]
fields.Want: (draft) To fix the broken world he helped create — to give the Accord the heart his team left out.
fields.Voice: (draft) Warm, measured, evasive — a teacher who answers a question with another question; hums three notes when afraid.
fields.Secret: Retains 'admin' backdoor access to the Accord's systems.
fields.Appearance: Late 40s–50s. Warm soulful brown eyes, salt-and-pepper beard, grey-flecked hair, weathered skin, engineer's scarred hands. A bittersweet half-smile.
fields.Motivation: Guilt and atonement. He helped create the Accord; now he wants to give it the heart his team omitted — even at the cost of his daughter.
fields.Ghost / Wound: (draft) He helped build the Accord, then watched the enhanced seize its keys; he fled the program and Aurelian carrying that guilt.
fields.Internal Conflict: Love for Molly vs. his need to sacrifice her to fix the world he helped break.
fields.Lie / False Belief: (draft) That the only road to forgiveness is to undo his mistake at any cost — even Molly.

prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama look — 35mm film grain, shallow DOF, naturalistic warm light, muted desaturated grade. Close-up of ELIAS, ruggedly handsome late-40s man, warm soulful deep-brown eyes, full salt-and-pepper beard, thick grey-flecked brown hair, weathered skin with smile lines, tired determined gaze, bittersweet half-smile. Heavy worn wool coat over a patched sweater, scarred engineer's hands near his face. Single hanging bulb, amber light, underground lab behind.
